## Inspector ID

`markdown_sections`

## Purpose

Report recurring section headings and how many files contain each.

## Usage

Inspectors take no configuration; they emit evidence — counts and distributions — for the reader to judge. Run this one over a corpus:

```
katalyst inspect <path> --inspector markdown_sections
```
